india_trends.title: Do SIPs beat lumpsum investments? Here’s what data shows
india_trends.summary: A study by DSP Asset Managers comparing 30 years of market data across major global markets suggests that SIPs may not always generate higher headline returns than lumpsum investing, but they often deliver more consistent and resilient outcomes for investors.

india_trends.title: Silver gains Rs 3,100/kg, gold at Rs 1.54 lakh/10g ahead of US inflation data, fading peace talk hopes. What should you do?
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices rose on MCX Tuesday as investors turned cautious ahead of key U.S. inflation data. Weakening hopes of a U.S.-Iran peace deal lifted crude oil prices, fuelling concerns that persistent inflation could keep global interest rates higher for longer.

india_trends.title: Goldline Pharmaceutical IPO opens today: Check GMP, subscription status, and other details
india_trends.summary: Goldline Pharmaceutical's IPO opened on May 12, aiming to raise ₹11.61 crore with shares priced between ₹41-43. The grey market premium suggests a debut price of ₹60. Funds will reduce debt and cover corporate expenses. Allotment results expected by May 15.
